description: Production MCP server for Postgres, Oracle, Snowflake, BigQuery, Redshift, DuckDB, MotherDuck.

cmd.description: Boots the MCP server. Use 'init' for interactive setup or 'doctor' to diagnose configuration.

name: io.github.kalehdoo/warehouse-mcp

environmentVariables.description: Set to 'stdio' for desktop AI clients (Claude Desktop, Cursor). Defaults to 'http'.
environmentVariables.name: MCP_TRANSPORT

environmentVariables.description: Which warehouse to connect to. One of: postgres, oracle, redshift, snowflake, bigquery, duckdb. (DuckDB also handles MotherDuck via DUCKDB_PATH=md:<db>.)
environmentVariables.name: WAREHOUSE_TYPE

environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated bearer keys with role and optional warehouse-role impersonation: 'key1:reader,key2:admin', 'key3:reader:set_role=alice'. Leave empty for stdio (OS process boundary is the trust boundary). Required for HTTP.
environmentVariables.name: MCP_API_KEYS

environmentVariables.description: DuckDB file path, ':memory:', or 'md:<database>' for MotherDuck. Required when WAREHOUSE_TYPE=duckdb.
environmentVariables.name: DUCKDB_PATH

environmentVariables.description: MotherDuck service token. Required when DUCKDB_PATH starts with 'md:'.
environmentVariables.name: MOTHERDUCK_TOKEN

environmentVariables.description: Postgres host. Required when WAREHOUSE_TYPE=postgres. (Use REDSHIFT_HOST for Redshift.)
environmentVariables.name: PG_HOST

environmentVariables.description: Oracle Easy Connect (e.g. host:1521/SERVICE), TNS descriptor, or alias.
environmentVariables.name: ORACLE_CONNECT_STRING

environmentVariables.description: Snowflake account identifier (e.g. xy12345.us-east-1). Required when WAREHOUSE_TYPE=snowflake.
environmentVariables.name: SNOWFLAKE_ACCOUNT

environmentVariables.description: Path to PKCS8 private key (.p8). Snowflake auth is key-pair only; password auth is not supported.
environmentVariables.name: SNOWFLAKE_PRIVATE_KEY_PATH

environmentVariables.description: GCP project id. Required when WAREHOUSE_TYPE=bigquery.
environmentVariables.name: BIGQUERY_PROJECT

environmentVariables.description: Path to BigQuery service-account JSON. Omit on GKE / Cloud Run with workload identity.
environmentVariables.name: GOOGLE_APPLICATION_CREDENTIALS

environmentVariables.description: Set to 'on' to enable role-aware PII masking on result rows (emails, SSNs, phones, IPs, Luhn-validated CCs). Off by default.
environmentVariables.name: GUARDRAIL_PII_MASK

environmentVariables.description: Per-principal token-bucket rate limit on tool invocations. 0 = disabled. Recommend 60 for production.
environmentVariables.name: MCP_RATE_LIMIT_RPM

runtimeArguments.description: Boots the MCP server. Use 'init' for interactive setup or 'doctor' to diagnose configuration.
